title: Starting a formal fund
author: i-am-alpha
selftext:
I own/operate a company that works with traders/strategists/signal generators to create official and regulated funds (whether it be hedge, long-only, exchange traded, PE, VC, etc.), collaborating to formalize/incubate the trading strategy, structure the fund, launch the fund, operate the fund (manage all back office functions), and raise capital from institutional investors in our network. Our team has been in the asset management industry for decades and the company already has funds under our umbrella that manage well into the millions of dollars.

We've been reviewing our pricing model and are keen to get community feedback on what you would be willing to pay for such a solution (considering all-in costs are around $30k) and if there are any other services that you think we should be offering. All feedback will be greatly appreciated - don't hesitate to reach out directly if you'd like to keep your feedback between us.
